text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It seems we're both running today, Fukukitaru.
Um... Good luck.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And that, everyone, was my impression of the me
from last year—a scaredy cat. Now, behold, the
very picture of composure!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Heaven never ceases to smile upon me! I'm sure
you witnessed the full effects during the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You say you've seen the other side of speed,
Suzuka? Hehehe! Wait till you get a load of me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With my almighty luck, I've breached the heavens
to see the gods themselves!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today will be a battle for the books. Divine Luck
versus the Speed Star. However...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm cool as a cucumber. With the heavens blessing
my every step, winning this race will be a walk in
the park.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka looks at me out of the corner of
her eye.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's probably... not okay. Ever since the Kikuka
Sho, she's been relying more and more on luck
and divine protection, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has an especially strange look in her eyes
today. I have a bad feeling about this.
